ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit rating agency */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating (e.g., WD, BB-, B+) */,
  "dynamics" TEXT /* Dynamics of the rating (e.g., Withdrawn, On Watch, Upgraded) */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Outlook of the rating (e.g., Stable, Developing) */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "rating_pillar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating pillar (e.g., business risk, financial risk) */,
  "rating_score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., company, government) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the entity (e.g., finance, energy) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the entity (e.g., banking, renewable energy) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the entity is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., public, private) */,
  "rating_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating scale used by the agency */,
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlook category used by the agency */,
  "dynamics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dynamics category used by the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating scale */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency using the scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating scale (e.g., AAA, BBB) */,
  "scale_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_scales_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlook */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency using the outlook */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlook (e.g., Stable, Developing) */,
  "outlook_description" TEXT /* Description of the outlook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlooks_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamics" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency using the dynamic */,
  "dynamic_name" TEXT /* Name of the dynamic (e.g., Withdrawn, On Watch) */,
  "dynamic_description" TEXT /* Description of the dynamic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamics_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "press_releases" (
  "press_release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each press release */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating associated with the press release */,
  "press_release_date" TEXT /* Date of the press release */,
  "press_release_url" TEXT /* URL of the press release */,
  "press_release_content" TEXT /* Content of the press release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("press_release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_press_releases_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rating */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the rating */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_pillars" (
  "pillar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pillar */,
  "pillar_name" TEXT /* Name of the pillar */,
  "pillar_description" TEXT /* Description of the pillar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pillar was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pillar was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pillar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pillar_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "pillar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pillar */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the pillar (e.g., 0.3, 0.7) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weight was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pillar_weights_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pillar_weights_pillar_id FOREIGN KEY ("pillar_id") REFERENCES rating_pillars ("pillar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "pillar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pillar */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the pillar (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_scores_pillar_id FOREIGN KEY ("pillar_id") REFERENCES rating_pillars ("pillar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_scores_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_scaling_factors" (
  "scaling_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaling factor */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "scaling_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaling factor (e.g., size adjustment, industry adjustment) */,
  "scaling_factor_value" REAL /* Value of the scaling factor (e.g., 0.5, 1.2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scaling factor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scaling factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaling_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_scaling_factors_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_industry_mapping" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_sector_mapping" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "sector_id")
)
